title: Bump ollama-bridge to v2.35.2 + verify route fix landed
description: Apply noetl#410 (FastAPI route fix) to the running cluster: bump bridge image, wait for rollout, exercise /jsonrpc to confirm the 422 is gone. Cluster-mutating, requires approval.

commands.shell: kubectl -n noetl set image deploy/ollama-bridge ollama-bridge=ghcr.io/noetl/noetl:v2.35.2

kubectl -n noetl exec deploy/ollama-bridge -- python3 -c 'import json,urllib.request,urllib.error; req=urllib.request.Request("http://localhost:8765/jsonrpc", data=json.dumps({"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/list"}).encode(), headers={"Content-Type":"application/json"}, method="POST"); print(urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10).read().decode())'
